items.example: The apartment block was really run-down, with paint peeling off the walls.
The flat was so cramped there was hardly room to move around.
The old building was crumbling and looked like it might collapse.
The flat was dark and dim, even during the day.
The bathroom was filthy and had obviously not been cleaned.
The heating wasn't working, so it was quite chilly inside.
They rented a modern block of flats in the city centre.
Finding affordable accommodation in the city is becoming harder.
The landlord refused to fix the broken heating system.
The tenant complained about the damp walls to the landlord.
You usually have to pay a deposit equal to one month's rent.
The rent for this flat is extremely high for the size.
